identity.mission: Create a Hotel Data Intelligence System that feels like a tactical command center mixed with a luxury concierge.
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Fintech precision with Hospitality warmth.
Emotion First: The user should feel 'In Control' and 'Empowered'.
Content is King: Data is the hero. Use negative space to let metrics breathe.
Zoom In: Focus on the document status details.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H4. Tight tracking (tracking-tight).

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, labels, data tables.

mono.usage: Use for document IDs, API keys, raw data views.

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. Gap-6 for grids.
layout_strategy.containers: Max-width-7xl for dashboard, Full-width for Landing.

card.styles: bg-[#111827] border border-white/5 rounded-xl shadow-lg hover:border-indigo-500/30 transition-colors duration-300

button.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-600 to-purple-600 hover:from-indigo-500 hover:to-purple-500 text-white shadow-lg shadow-indigo-500/20 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all hover:scale-[1.02]
button.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all

input.styles: bg-[#030712] border border-white/10 focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 text-white placeholder:text-gray-600 transition-all

status_badge.success: bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/20 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
status_badge.processing: bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/20 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium animate-pulse
status_badge.error: bg-rose-500/10 text-rose-400 border border-rose-500/20 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
status_badge.pending: bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-400 border border-amber-500/20 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use 'Phosphor Icons' (Duotone) if available for feature cards.

universal_guidelines: NEVER use gradients on text unless it is a massive H1.
Dark Mode is mandatory. Do not create a light mode toggle.
Use 'Lucide React' icons with stroke-width={1.5} for elegance.
All interactive elements must have a data-testid attribute.
Charts must use the custom 'Recharts' configuration with dark tooltips.
instructions_to_main_agent: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors and fonts.
Create a 'Layout' component that wraps the app with the dark theme provider (if using next-themes) or just sets the class 'dark' on html.
Implement the 'Dashboard' first, then 'Upload', then 'Knowledge Base'.
Use the provided image URLs for the Landing Page hero and feature sections.
